name: canup-sdk
description: CanUp SDK monorepo — @canup/ui React components and @canup/cli developer tool.

simple-git-hooks.pre-commit: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo '\n❌ Cannot commit directly to main. Create a feature branch first.\n' >&2; exit 1; fi && pnpm lint-staged
simple-git-hooks.pre-push: while read local_ref rest; do case "$local_ref" in refs/tags/*) ;; *) branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo '\n❌ Cannot push directly to main. Use a branch + PR.\n' >&2; exit 1; fi ;; esac; done
